Package org.areslib.math.geometry

Class Rotation3d

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.math.geometry.Rotation3d
public class Rotation3d extends Object
A rotation in 3D space represented by a unit quaternion (w + xi + yj + zk).

Quaternions avoid gimbal lock and provide smooth interpolation. This class is used for AprilTag 3D pose estimation, camera mount transforms, and AdvantageScope 3D field visualization.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Rotation3d()
    Constructs the identity rotation (no rotation).
    Rotation3d(double roll, double pitch, double yaw)
    Constructs a Rotation3d from extrinsic roll, pitch, and yaw Euler angles.
    Rotation3d(double w, double x, double y, double z)
    Constructs a Rotation3d from a unit quaternion.

  • Constructor Details

    • Rotation3d

      public Rotation3d()
      Constructs the identity rotation (no rotation).

    • Rotation3d

      public Rotation3d(double w, double x, double y, double z)
      Constructs a Rotation3d from a unit quaternion. The quaternion will be normalized if necessary.
      Parameters:
      w - The scalar (real) component.
      x - The x component of the vector part.
      y - The y component of the vector part.
      z - The z component of the vector part.

    • Rotation3d

      public Rotation3d(double roll, double pitch, double yaw)
      Constructs a Rotation3d from extrinsic roll, pitch, and yaw Euler angles.

      This uses the XYZ convention: roll around X, then pitch around Y, then yaw around Z.

      Parameters:
      roll - Rotation around the X axis in radians.
      pitch - Rotation around the Y axis in radians.
      yaw - Rotation around the Z axis in radians.

      public double getW()

      public double getX()

      public double getZ()

    • getRoll

      public double getRoll()
      Returns the roll (rotation around X) in radians.
      Returns:
      The roll in radians.

    • getPitch

      public double getPitch()
      Returns the pitch (rotation around Y) in radians.
      Returns:
      The pitch in radians.

    • getYaw

      public double getYaw()
      Returns the yaw (rotation around Z) in radians.
      Returns:
      The yaw in radians.

    • rotateBy

      public Rotation3d rotateBy(Rotation3d other)
      Composes this rotation with another (Hamilton product).
      Parameters:
      other - The rotation to apply after this one.
      Returns:
      The composed rotation.

    • unaryMinus

      public Rotation3d unaryMinus()
      Returns the inverse of this rotation (conjugate of the unit quaternion).
      Returns:
      The inverse rotation.

    • toRotation2d

      public Rotation2d toRotation2d()
      Projects this 3D rotation down to a 2D rotation by extracting the yaw component.
      Returns:
      The 2D rotation.
